t_ch: 旧日仙女木的影子，依照莲食学派的说法，它们只分得了瑟希斯的零星智慧，心智混沌。
t_en: According to the Lotophagist school of thought, the shadows of ancient White Dryads only received fragments of Cerces's wisdom, leaving their minds in chaos.

t_ch: 你凑近聆听，听到了几缕细微的回响。「呼呼欸嘿」是欢欣的声音，「扑簌簌、啪嗒…」是目睹树干断裂，弱小的生命为巨树的毁伤而哀哭的声音。
t_en: You lean in to listen, catching faint echoes. "Hoo-hoo-hehe" is the sound of joy, while "rustle rustle, plop..." is the sound of witnessing tree trunks breaking, tiny lives weeping for the wounds inflicted upon the giant tree.

t_ch: 你想起了扶起巨树的丹恒，和他对荒笛许下的承诺。那么，仙女木的未来也靠他了。
t_en: You recall Dan Heng propping up the giant tree, and his promise to Terravox. Now, the White Dryads' future rests in his hands, too.

t_ch: 天哪——「8」！来财！财从八方来。
t_en: Oh my gosh— "8"! That's money right there! Money coming from all directions!

t_ch: 越看这个符号，越像一个优美的碱水面包结——也许你是真的饿了。
t_en: The more you look at this symbol, the more it resembles an elegant pretzel. Maybe you're actually hungry.

t_ch: 你在星穹列车的窗外看到过相似的「8」，当忆者拨开迷雾，翁法罗斯以一道首尾循环的光带呈现在所有人视线里。故事以此为起点，终点又将通往何方呢？
t_en: You've seen a similar "8" outside the window of the Astral Express. When the Memokeeper parted the mist, Amphoreus revealed itself to everyone's eyes as a band of light that loops back on itself. As the story begins here, where will its end lead us?

t_ch: 你仍然记得，在大墓的最深处，你们将德谬歌的符号转变为无限的符号，为翁法罗斯许诺了它应得的未来。
t_en: You still remember, in the deepest part of the Great Tomb, how you converted the symbol of Demiurge into the symbol of infinity, promising Amphoreus the future it deserves.

t_ch: 从高处俯视，位于大墓深处的每个点光源都如此渺小。但你曾身处其中，你清楚那是无数台巨型机器发出的强光。
t_en: From up high, each source of light deep within the Great Tomb looks so tiny. But you've been down there. You know those are powerful beams from countless massive machines.

t_ch: 临时的哲思涌上了心头——就像是星空中那微弱颤栗的星光，也许正是数万光年外的一次刻骨铭心的燃烧。
t_en: A fleeting philosophical thought washed over me, like the faint, trembling starlight in the cosmos, perhaps it was the echo of a soul-searing blaze from tens of thousands of light-years away.

t_ch: 海洋、天空与大地。支柱三泰坦的符文刻印在罗盘上方。
t_en: Ocean, Sky, and Earth. The runes of the Three Titans of Foundation are engraved above the Compass.

t_ch: 或许意味着，当浪漫与理性、诡计与律法、命运与岁月、乃至纷争与死亡…人为概念中的一切消失殆尽时，一切都会回归物理意义上支撑世界的本原。
t_en: Perhaps it means that when romance and reason, schemes and laws, destiny and time, even strife and death... when all these human constructs fade away, everything will return to the fundamental physical principles that truly support our world.

t_ch: 在不同世界的作品中，人们更多地选择「深渊」来展示「大地」那危险而未知的一面——毕竟「大地」是如此平凡又广阔，那些高尚的品德反而会被遗忘。
t_en: In works across different worlds, people tend to choose "The Abyss" to showcase the dangerous and unknown side of "Earth." After all, "Earth" is so ordinary and vast that its noble virtues often fade into oblivion.

t_ch: 或许只有当四周皆是深渊时，人们才会意识到，足下的「大地」究竟多么弥足珍贵。
t_en: Perhaps only when surrounded by the Abyss do people truly realize just how precious the "Earth" beneath their feet really is.

t_ch: 你仔细端详上面的纹路，它像等高线地形图，像一座俯瞰的迷宫，更像某个穿背带裤的手工大师喜欢的焊接道具…等等，这不是电路板吗？
t_en: You examine the patterns carefully. They look like topographic contours, like a maze looking from above, or maybe even some soldering tool that a certain suspender-wearing craftsman would love... Wait a minute, isn't this a circuit board?

t_ch: 一段没有来由的旋律出现在你的脑海中：「灯！等灯，等灯！」
t_en: A random melody pops into your head: "Light! Wait for the light, wait for the light!"

t_ch: 世界是一块巨大的数据元件，人一生能涉足的信息不过是其中亿万分之一。
t_en: The world is a massive data component, and all the information one can access in a lifetime is merely one billionth of it.

t_ch: 被水淹没的房间，却有着巨大的风扇，一时间，你无法判断这座房间采用的是风冷还是水冷系统。
t_en: The room is flooded with water, yet has massive fans installed. For a moment, you can't tell if this room uses an air-cooling or water-cooling system.

t_ch: 可以肯定，会把风冷和水冷系统装在一起的人，一定是位狂野派。至少看现状，很好地集成了它们的缺点。
t_en: For sure, anyone who'd put air and water cooling systems together must be a real maverick. And looking at how things turned out, they've managed to perfectly combine the worst of both worlds.

t_ch: 一瞬间灵感降临，你悟了，这里分明是座精心打造的高端风水局——宇宙风水学，在帝皇权杖中再次成为显学。
t_en: In a flash of inspiration, it hits you: This place is clearly a meticulously crafted high-end feng shui formation. Cosmic feng shui has once again become a prestigious field of study in the Emperor's Scepter.

t_ch: 你确信自己看到了墙壁背后的「硬盘」，莫非你正身处在一个巨大的演算装置内部？又是谁打破了墙壁，扎格列斯大手的冲拳吗？
t_en: You're certain you saw a "hard drive" behind the wall. Could you be inside some massive computational device? And who broke through the wall. Was it one of Zagreus's mighty punches?

t_ch: 感谢命运指引我们再次相遇，可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}~想再来听利波吟唱一曲吗？
t_en: Thank the fates for guiding us to meet again, my dear {F#lady}{M#sir}~ Would you like to hear another song from Lipos?

t_ch: 向您问好，救世的英雄。感谢诸位为翁法罗斯重新谱写出希望的乐章，可惜此刻身侧并无水漫琴，否则正好能为利波小先生伴奏一曲。
t_en: Greetings, heroes of deliverance. Thank you all for composing a new symphony of hope for Amphoreus. It's a pity I don't have a water lyre with me right now, or I could have accompanied little Master Lipos with a tune.

t_ch: 能再见到你们真好…
t_en: It's so good to see you all again...

t_ch: 没事，我喜欢听清唱的版本。
t_en: It's fine. I like listening to the a cappella version.

t_ch: 有幸重聚于此，此时此景真是应该创作些新的诗歌。利波听说希诺你有些新的感悟……
t_en: Since we're fortunate enough to reunite here, this moment calls for some new stanzas to be composed. I heard that you've had some new insights, Zeno...

t_ch: 啊…此处安乐无忧、美景恒常，然我仍有疑虑长伴：正如已被替换全部零件的船只，再创之世是否仍保有其本原？我等置身其中，灵魂又是否还一如从前……
t_en: Ah... Though peace and beauty reign eternal here, a doubt still lingers: Like a ship whose parts have all been replaced, does this world, reassembled, still retain its essence? And we who dwell within it, are our souls still the same as before...?

t_ch: 你在叽里咕噜地说些什么呢？满口荒唐的样子真是半分未变。
t_en: What are you mumbling about? You're still talking nonsense, just like old times.

t_ch: 你还没有理解我的意思，我的老朋友。瞧，这世界早已不同以往，人间乱象俱成云烟，而此处唯余永恒静谧、凝滞默然……
t_en: You still haven't grasped my meaning, old friend. Look, this world is no longer what it used to be. All the chaos of human existence has turned to mist, and all that remains here is eternal tranquility, frozen in stillness...

t_ch: 但要我说，你在，故聒噪在——世界从来就不静谧，也不默然。
t_en: But if you ask me, you exist, and therefore noises do, too. The world has never been peaceful or silent.

t_ch: 哈，这两位还是老样子呢…利波近来可没少从他们身上取材，新作的诗歌就连赫西俄德老师都忍不住发笑呢。
t_en: Heh, these two haven't changed a bit... I have been getting plenty of material from them lately. Even Master Hesiod couldn't help but laugh at my latest poems!

t_ch: 对了…利波、利波正在为您与英雄们书写一本诗集，好让诸位的事迹为后世所传唱…序章题词的话，利波想交给赫西俄德老师创作，您觉得怎么样？
t_en: Oh right... I'm writing a collection of poems about you and the heroes, so your deeds can be passed down through the ages... For the prologue's inscription, I was thinking of asking Master Hesiod to compose it. What do you think?

t_ch: 你行不行啊，难道还等着角色去代入你吗？
t_en: Can you or can you not handle this? Are you waiting to get into the characters?

t_ch: 我真要代入了你又不乐意，再说了，你这水平真能看懂我的演技吗？
t_en: If I really get into the characters, you won't like it either. Besides, are you even skilled enough to appreciate my acting?

t_ch: 我觉得可以这么画……
t_en: I think we could paint it like this...

t_ch: 我同意，不过这里可能需要把阴影关系加强一些……
t_en: I agree, but we might need to strengthen the shadows here...

t_ch: 不愧是传说中的青冈木，就是结实！再配上阿芙罗小姐编的羊毛毯，嘿嘿，简直了……
t_en: As expected of the legendary blue oak. It's super sturdy! And with Miss Aphrea's knitted wool blanket on top, hehe, it's just perfect...

t_ch: 一把破椅子折腾这么久，有这个闲功夫，还不如多帮我整理几份资料。
t_en: All this fuss over an old chair... You could've helped me sort through some files instead of wasting all this time.

t_ch: 怎么说话呢你，在你眼中，它是张破椅子；可在我的眼中，它是世上最伟大的小窝。再说了，你那箩筐又好到哪去……
t_en: Watch your mouth! To you, it may be just some ratty old chair, but to me, it's the greatest little nest in the world. Besides, your junk basket isn't any better...

t_ch: 这筐，似曾相识…
t_en: This basket... looks oddly familiar...

t_ch: 再说一遍——这是我家！没有我的许可，不能乱翻！
t_en: Let me say it again: This is my home! You keep your hands off and don't dig through it unless I say otherwise!

t_ch: 你们俩的关系真是好啊…
t_en: You two really get along well...

t_ch: 那可不，这也算是一种孽缘了。
t_en: You bet. Talk about a twisted fate!

t_ch: 又见面了。托你和那些黄金裔的福，我得以亲眼目睹「再创世」。看来我的推论没错——世界循环，而灵魂不灭。
t_en: We meet again. Thanks to you and those Chrysos Heirs, I witnessed the "Era Nova" with my own eyes. It seems my theory was right — the world cycles, and souls are eternal.

t_ch: 又来了…那个「在某一个时刻，我可以是你，你也可以是我」理论吗？
t_en: Here we go again... that whole "somewhere in this endless cycle, I might live as you, and you as me" spiel?

t_ch: 有这闲功夫说这些让人听不懂的旧理论，还不如聊聊我的新椅子呢！
t_en: Instead of wasting time on these old theories no one can understand, let's talk about my new chair!

t_ch: 前辈的箩筐也是…哈哈，两位一过来就都是有房人士了，当真让人羡慕。
t_en: Your weaved basket, too... Heh, you both became homeowners right off the bat here, I'm seriously jealous!

t_ch: 行了，无聊的玩笑到此为止。总之出于各种原因，我们现在的研究课题是「星空」。
t_en: Alright, enough with the teasing. Long story short, for various reasons, our research topic is now the "Starry Skies."

t_ch: 我打算先绘制一幅星图，恩维尔和玛格什都在帮忙。你要是有空，记得过来……
t_en: I'm planning to draw an astral chart first. Avilius and Margusa are helping out. If you're free, remember to drop by...

t_ch: 诶呦，瞧瞧这人，抓我这个不会画画的邻居来凑数就算了，连无辜的路人都不放过。
t_en: Tsk, what even is this!? Not only did they drag an artistically challenged neighbor such as me into this, they're even roping in innocent bystanders!

t_ch: 嗯…总之，{NICKNAME}放心，我们不会让第欧根娜麻烦您这个大忙人的。
t_en: Hmm... anyway, {NICKNAME}, don't worry. We won't let Diogena bother a busy person like yourself.

t_ch: 就照着这个做，我们能改变翁法罗斯航空界，价钱好商量！
t_en: Just follow this plan, and we can revolutionize the Amphorean aviation industry! Price negotiable!

t_ch: 哪来的图纸…等等，你又想整什么幺蛾子了？！
t_en: Where'd you get that blueprint... Wait, what kind of crazy scheme are you cooking up now!?

t_ch: …边缘这里最好用回针来绣，重叠的针脚能让花纹变得更加清晰。
t_en: ...It's best to use a back stitch for the edges here. The overlapping stitches will make the patterns clearer.

t_ch: 那这边呢…长短针是不是比较合适？
t_en: And how about this here... Would long and short stitches work better?

t_ch: 没错！瞧，你其实很有天赋，只需要多加练习、熟能生巧……
t_en: That's right! See, you've got real talent! You just need more practice, and you'll get the hang of it...

t_ch: 她巧手专精，本人亲测。
t_en: She's got magic hands. I can vouch for that.

t_ch: 啊，是你，{F#女士}{M#先生}！快看看我的刺绣！
t_en: Ah, it's you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}! Come look at my embroidery!

t_ch: 小阿格莱雅和小赛飞儿？
t_en: Little Aglaea and little Cipher?

t_ch: …虽然没太听懂你具体在说什么，就权当您的赞美吧。
t_en: ...Well, I don't quite understand what you were saying, but I'll take it as a compliment.

t_ch: 尽管她在我这里做学徒，不过我倒是觉得她以后更适合当一名刻法勒的祭司呢。
t_en: Although she's my apprentice, I actually think she'd be better suited as a Kephale priest in the future.

t_ch: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你和斐第斯叔叔果然没有骗我们！呜…伟大的泰坦真的庇佑着我们——爸爸、妈妈、还有大家…都回来了…呜……
t_en: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, you and Uncle Phedes really weren't lying to us! *sniff* The great Titan truly was watching over us... Dad, Mom, and everyone... they're all back... *sniff*

t_ch: 是啊，这当真是个美丽的新世界。其实彼时我并未曾奢望还能与伏尔甘再次相见…感谢您，英雄，也感谢黄金裔的诸位——我从未奢望过能有这样的重逢。
t_en: Indeed, what a beautiful new world this is. Back then, I never dared to hope I would meet Vulcan again... Thank you, hero, and thanks to all the Chrysos Heirs... I never dreamed such a reunion would be possible.

t_ch: 道谢的话算我一个！不过说起来…阿芙罗姐姐的追求者们也在「重逢」之列吗？
t_en: Count me in on the thanks! But come to think of it... are Aphrea's admirers also on the "reunion" list?

t_ch: 我听说——只是听说哦——就在前不久，才有对兄妹为你「更喜欢他们哪一个」的问题打起来了……
t_en: I heard — just rumors, mind you — that not too long ago, a pair of brother and sister got into a fight over which one of them you liked better...

t_ch: 喔嚯！这么劲爆——新书的题材这不就有了？好徒弟，回头请你吃点好的！
t_en: Whoa! This is explosive stuff! Now that's what I call book material! My dear apprentice, I'll treat you to something nice later!

t_ch: 好耶——那我要吃……
t_en: Yay! Then I want to eat...

t_ch: 克、帖、西、芬——
t_en: Cte-si-pho-na—

t_ch: 我错了！！！开个玩笑，你可千万别跟我哥告状！咳…那什么， {NICKNAME}啊，其实我打算以你为主角写本小说来着……
t_en: I'm sorry!!! Just kidding, please don't tell my brother! Ahem... Say, {NICKNAME}, I was actually thinking of writing a novel with you as the main character...

t_ch: 真的吗，你真的能写好吗？
t_en: Really? Are you sure you can write it well?

t_ch: 跟我的经纪人聊聊授权吧…
t_en: Talk to my agent about the licensing...

t_ch: 你那是什么表情！我的小说可是本本大卖好吗？而且我这次打算写严肃文学，你就给我好好期待吧！
t_en: What's with that look on your face! All my novels are bestsellers, okay? And this time I'm going for serious literature, so you'd better look forward to it!

t_ch: 我也会一起帮忙的！嗯…老师，那大餐……
t_en: I'll help out too! Um... Miss, about that feast...

t_ch: 诶呀，少不了你的，等希瑞雅手上的针线活忙完了，咱们一起去！
t_en: Hey now, don't worry! Once Serena finishes up her needlework, we'll all go together!

t_ch: 教了你这么久，记住刻法勒的祭仪最重要的是什么了吗？
t_en: After teaching you for so long, do you remember what's most important about the Kephale ritual?

t_ch: 我…对不起，我还是记不住那些复杂的流程和祷词……
t_en: I... I'm sorry, I still can't remember all those complicated procedures and prayers...

t_ch: 谁让你记那些了？这傻小子…当然是要虔诚！虔诚知道吗！
t_en: Who told you to remember all that? You silly kid... What matters is piety! Piety, you hear me!?

t_ch: 斐第斯叔叔，我刚刚表现得怎么样？
t_en: Uncle Phedes, how did I do just now?

t_ch: 非常好，你以后一定能成为一名优秀的战士。
t_en: Excellent. You'll definitely become a great warrior someday.

t_ch: 那太好啦，我就想变得像你一样英勇又可靠！
t_en: That's awesome! I want to be brave and reliable, just like you!

t_ch: 我那些特产要是卖不完怎么办？再带回去就放坏了，我绝对不允许浪费食物……
t_en: What if I can't sell all these local specialties? They'll spoil if I take them back... I absolutely cannot let food go to waste...

t_ch: 多简单啊，先开个预售呗，然后根据预约量再决定送多少食材过来？
t_en: Easy-peasy! Why not start with a pre-sale and then decide how many ingredients to ship here based on the pre-registration numbers?

t_ch: 这主意不错…等等，怎么听上去就像是做生意的常识。
t_en: That's not a bad idea... Wait, why does this just sound like basic business sense?

t_ch: 可是…靠谱吗？如果有客人预定了却不来怎么办？
t_en: But... is it reliable? What if customers make reservations but don't show up?

t_ch: 那也有控制风险的手段，比如，先收一部分定金……
t_en: Well, there are ways to control the risk, like getting a deposit upfront...

t_ch: 所以，你是在教他做生意？
t_en: So, you're teaching him how to do business?

t_ch: 嗨呀，你就说阿忒这套商业模式好不好用吧！
t_en: Hey, Aitee's business model is totally working!

t_ch: 你们仨怎么凑一起了？
t_en: How did the three of you end up together?

t_ch: 嗨，又见面啦，冒险家{F#女士}{M#先生}！他们在商量联动的事呢。
t_en: Hey, nice to see you again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Adventurer! They're discussing the collaboration plans.

t_ch: 您来得正好，客人——我和西塔罗斯正在筹备个美食艺术基地！
t_en: Perfect timing, dear guest — Theodoros and I are planning to set up a culinary art base!

t_ch: 聚焦于「城邦」这一概念，通过鲜明的装修风格、经典的地方菜品、传统的特色餐具及用餐礼仪，让顾客们全方位多角度地沉浸在美食文化中……
t_en: Focusing on the concept of "City-State," through distinctive decorative styles, classic local dishes, traditional specialty tableware, and dining etiquette, customers can immerse themselves in food culture from multiple perspectives...

t_ch: 咳，简单来说，就是开一家主题餐厅，另外再定期搞点活动什么的宣传宣传。目前考虑的风格有：奥赫玛、悬锋城、雅努萨波利斯、斯缇科西亚、神悟树庭……
t_en: *ahem* Long story short, I'm thinking of opening a themed restaurant and promoting it with some regular events. The styles we're considering include Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, Janusopolis, Styxia, Grove of Epiphany...

t_ch: 现在什么进度了？
t_en: What's the progress now?

t_ch: 绝赞筹划中——换句话说，目前什么都还没开始。
t_en: In the amazing planning phase — in other words, absolutely nothing has started yet.

t_ch: 神悟树庭主题能好吃吗？
t_en: How can the Grove of Epiphany theme be tasty?

t_ch: 你有所不知，莲食学派的「素肉」可是很受欢迎呢！不过话说回来……
t_en: You'd be surprised that the "mock meat" made by the Lotophagists is actually super popular! But anyway...

t_ch: 咳…诚如你所见，我和克瑞斯都没什么商业头脑——比如餐厅的选址装修、投资的预算和成本、营销和推广的策略啊…还好有阿忒在。
t_en: *ahem*... As you can see, neither Kyros nor I have much business sense. You know, things like restaurant location and decoration, investment budgeting and costs, marketing and promotion strategies... Thank goodness we have Aitee.

t_ch: 这姑娘不仅执行力强，还有烹饪天赋——有这样的接班人，我每天都是笑着醒来的！
t_en: This girl not only has great execution skills, but also a talent for cooking. With such a successor, I wake up with a smile every day!

t_ch: 没、没有他们说得那么夸张，我就是突然觉得，像这样忙起来其实还挺充实的……
t_en: I—It's not as dramatic as they make it sound... I just suddenly realized that being busy like this actually feels pretty fulfilling...

t_ch: 别那么谦虚嘛，你可是咱们餐厅未来的希望。怎么样，要不要来和我学做陶罐啊？
t_en: Don't be so modest. You're the future hope of our restaurant. What do you say, wanna learn how to make dolia with me?

t_ch: 去去去，你小子，想要学徒自己找去，少惦记我们家孩子。
t_en: Shoo shoo shoo, you punk! If you want an apprentice, go find one yourself. Keep your eyes off my kid.

t_ch: 这两位又开始了…咳、总之，等餐厅开起来，我们都期待你的光临哦，无敌的冒险家。
t_en: Here they go again... *ahem* Anyway, once the restaurant opens, we look forward to your visit, O invincible Adventurer.

t_ch: 女士，新上的草药香袋，能提神醒脑、平心静气，您要试试吗？
t_en: Ma'am, would you like to try our new herbal sachet? It helps boost energy and calm the mind.

t_ch: 诶呀，你的手艺我信得过，我女儿可喜欢你选的香袋了。
t_en: Oh my, I trust your craftsmanship completely. My daughter absolutely loved the sachet you picked out!

t_ch: 瞧一瞧，看一看喽——蝉联三届「奥凯纳斯运动会」冠军使用的的同款铁饼！
t_en: Step right up, folks! Get a look at this. The very same discus used by the three-time champion of the Okeanas Games!

t_ch: 您看，这外观，朴实无华之中尽显格调；您瞧，这手感，精雕细琢铸就绝佳体验！
t_en: Look here, the appearance — understated elegance with impeccable style. And feel this, the craftsmanship... meticulously sculpted for an absolutely sublime experience!

t_ch: 黑潮之中，竞技的英雄用他那铁饼击碎怪物的侵袭；和平的日子里，高尚的冠军愿将这光荣的象征无私分享——
t_en: In the black tide, the competitive hero shatters monsters' invasions with his discus. In times of peace, the noble champion generously shares this symbol of glory.

t_ch: 新店开张，买铁饼赠签名石板！数量有限，先到先得！走过路过不要错过啊……
t_en: Grand opening! Buy iron discs and get a signed tablet for free! Limited quantity, first come, first served! Don't miss out...

t_ch: 你俩又开始卖假货了？
t_en: You two selling knockoffs again?

t_ch: 哪儿能啊，瞧您说的——正主就在旁边站着呢，我们这次可是有授权的！
t_en: No way, how could you say that. The real champion is standing right here. We've got official permission this time!

t_ch: 说好的黎明机器灯罩呢？
t_en: What happened to the Dawn Device's lampshade you promised?

t_ch: 咱们这叫与时俱进——您想想，比起遥不可及的泰坦，可不是身边的英雄更有噱…咳、我是说，更有亲切感嘛！
t_en: This is what we call keeping up with the times. Think about it, compared to those distant Titans, isn't a hero close to home more gimmick... *ahem* I mean, more relatable!

t_ch: 自从上次在黑潮中被两位搭救，我们兄弟俩时时刻刻不敢忘记这份大恩大德。
t_en: Ever since you two saved us from the black tide that time, my brother and I have never forgotten your immense kindness and grace.

t_ch: 没错没错！要不是没找到机会跟您联系，我们还想做您的同款球棒呢！
t_en: That's right, that's right! If we hadn't lost touch with you, we would've loved to make a replication of your very bat!

t_ch: 别惦记了，你买不起授权。
t_en: Forget about it. You can't afford the license.

t_ch: 诶呀，都是过命的交情了，您不会还在乎那点版权费吧？柯库翁先生可是连半个利衡币都没跟我们要呢！
t_en: Oh come on, we've been through thick and thin together! You're not still hung up about those royalty fees, are you? Mr. Glykon didn't even ask us for half a Balance Coin!

t_ch: 你们俩个，坏得很啊。
t_en: You two are up to no good.

t_ch: 您这就冤枉人了——我们放着前景大好的黎明机器灯罩不做，搞起现在的买卖，不就是为了让两位的英雄事迹广为流传嘛！
t_en: Now that's not fair. We gave up making the promising Dawn Device lampshades to start this business, and it's all to spread the word about your heroic deeds!

t_ch: 唉…虽然我有意保持低调，但既然两位真心实意地想表达感谢，总不好拒绝…唉，都怪我这该死的魅力！
t_en: *sigh*... Although I try to keep a low profile, I can't really turn down your sincere gratitude... *sigh*, curse my irresistible charm!

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}！告诉你个好消息，下届「奥凯纳斯运动会」将在{RUBY_B#二月}平衡月{RUBY_E#}中旬举行，我给你在第一排留了位置！
t_en: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}! I've got some great news — the next "Okeanas Games" will be held in the middle of {RUBY_B#February}the Month of Balance{RUBY_E#}, and I've saved you a front-row seat!

t_ch: 过几天我就去找忒斯庇斯写获奖宣言，放心，致谢词里提到的第一个名字肯定是你！
t_en: In a few days, I'll go find Thespis to write my award acceptance speech. Don't worry, your name will definitely be the first one mentioned in the acknowledgments!

t_ch: 以柯库翁先生的实力，本届的桂冠必是他囊中之物！让我们预祝冠军的凯旋——
t_en: With Mr. Glykon's prowess, this year's wreath is as good as his! Let's toast to the champion's triumphant return.

t_ch: 哈哈，感谢！那你们也别急着卖铁饼了，不如先等我再赢个冠军回来吧。
t_en: Haha, thanks! Don't rush to sell those iron pancakes just yet. Wait until I bring back another championship!

t_ch: 这…可是…可是我们还想为柯库翁先生做点什么……
t_en: But... but... we still want to do something for Mr. Glykon...

t_ch: 您想想，要是比赛的时候，整个观众席都是知道了您的光荣事迹、慕名而来的崇拜者，这得多热闹！
t_en: Just imagine: During the match, the whole audience would be filled with admirers who've heard about your glorious achievements and came to see you in person. What a spectacle that would be!

t_ch: 对对对——到时候我们兄弟俩保证带头为您欢呼，咱们的大英雄——{NICKNAME}阁下也会到场，对吧？
t_en: Yeah, yeah, yeah. We bros promise to lead the cheers for you when the time comes, and our great hero {NICKNAME} will be there too, right?

t_ch: 太好了，要说有什么值得我无比欣慰，那必定是奇美拉并未消失在历史的长河中……
t_en: Fantastic! If there's anything that brings me immense relief, it's definitely that the chimeras haven't vanished into the river of history...

t_ch: 奇美拉——奇美拉永远是最棒的——！
t_en: Chimeras! Chimeras are forever the best!

t_ch: 唉…唉！你们别光顾着笑啊，倒是给我出出主意！
t_en: *sigh*... Hey! Stop laughing and help me figure something out here!

t_ch: 年轻人活泼点好。看看我家波瑟芬妮，整天把自己关在房间里做研究，我还巴不得她多活动活动呢。
t_en: It's good for young people to be lively. Look at my Possephone, cooped up in her room doing research all day. I actually wish she'd get out and about more!

t_ch: 要我说啊，你家姑娘从小就是闲不住的性子，曳石学派说不定还真挺适合她们的。
t_en: If you ask me, your girls have always been the type who can't sit still. Helkolithism might actually be a pretty good fit for them.

t_ch: 哪儿那么简单！你们又不是不知道，就她俩那闯祸的能力，当初在树庭求学的时候可没少挨通报……
t_en: If only it were that simple! You know those two all too well. With their talent for causing trouble, they got called out plenty of times back at the Grove during their studies...

t_ch: 哈哈，这个我作证。咱们老费贝尔可是那届唯一一个见过所有导师的学生家属。
t_en: Haha, I can vouch for that. Old Fabio here was the only parent in that student cohort who met every single teacher.

t_ch: 去去去——老东西，哪壶不开提哪壶！你……
t_en: Oh, come on — you old geezer, way to bring up exactly what you shouldn't! You...

t_ch: 你们聊得很开心啊。
t_en: You guys seem to be having a great time.

t_ch: 咦，这是…几位，快看看谁来了——
t_en: Huh, what's this... hey everyone, look who's here —

t_ch: 好听，爱听，多讲讲。
t_en: Love it, keep going, tell me more.

t_ch: 听什么听，一边玩…嗯？是你啊，年轻人！好久不见，来找我们聊天啦？
t_en: What are you listening t— Oh? Is that you, young one! Long time no see. Came by for a chat?

t_ch: 诶呦，你来得正是时候！前两天我才刚收到一幅刻法勒的三联画，是难得的孤品，有空给你鉴赏鉴赏。
t_en: Oh hey, perfect timing! I just received a rare Kephale triptych the other day — it's quite a unique piece. You should come check it out when you have the chance.

t_ch: 嘶——你又买了？不是上周才入了三套彩釉摆件吗？得亏你家阿克蒙来钱快，不然谁养得起你这败家老东西。
t_en: Tsk... you bought more? Didn't you just get three sets of glazed figurines last week? Lucky for you, your boy Akmonides rakes in the cash, or nobody could afford to keep up with your shopaholic old self.

t_ch: 我花的都是自己的小金库！再说了，我总共才找他借过几次钱，哪回没老老实实打欠条！不像某人，儿子不声不响地连养老的房子都给买好了。
t_en: I'm spending my own savings here! Besides, I've only borrowed from him a few times, and I've always written an IOU like a good sport! Unlike someone whose son went and bought a retirement home without saying a word.

t_ch: 可拉倒吧，你那堆破烂要是都卖出去，两套房钱都有了。
t_en: Oh, come off it! If you managed to sell all that junk of yours, you'd have enough for two houses by now.

t_ch: 停停停，找你们给我出主意，先拌上嘴了是吧！
t_en: Whoa whoa whoa, I asked for your advice, and you fellows started bickering instead!

t_ch: 你遇上麻烦了？
t_en: Got yourself in trouble?

t_ch: 麻烦倒算不上，就是我家那俩不省心的女儿，突然跟我说要转投曳石学派……
t_en: It's not really trouble, It's just that my two troublemaker daughters suddenly told me they want to change to the Helkolithist school...

t_ch: 还有瓜？细说！
t_en: Got more tea to spill? Do tell!

t_ch: 什么瓜！还不是我家那俩不省心的女儿，突然跟我说要转投曳石学派……
t_en: No tea! Just those trouble-making daughters of mine, suddenly telling me they want to change to the Helkolithist school...

t_ch: 不是刻板印象啊，但我听说那个学派的人都讲究「在物理上强有力地击倒对手」，就我家那俩不省心的，跟他们待久怕不是得拆房子了……
t_en: Not to stereotype, but I heard the folks from that school are all about "physically overpowering their opponents." With those two troublemakers at home, I'm worried they'll end up demolishing the house if they hang around them too long...

t_ch: 得了吧，这就是刻板印象——人家那叫「专注于人类体能和心理现象的研究和实践」。
t_en: Oh come on, that's just a stereotype — they call it "research and practice focused on human physical and psychological phenomena."

t_ch: 好啦好啦，你们俩也别争了，年轻人的事就让他们去操心吧。咱们做父母的，总该相信自己的孩子不是？
t_en: Alright, alright, you two stop arguing. Let the young ones worry about their own business. As parents, shouldn't we trust our kids?

t_ch: 今天店里新上了批麦迪特瑞恩蜜果，可新鲜了，我拿些给你们尝尝。{NICKNAME}别急着走，也有你的份。
t_en: We just got a fresh batch of Mediterrana figs in the shop today. They're super fresh! Here, let me get some for you to try. Hey {NICKNAME}, don't run off! I've got some for you too!

t_ch: 果然，即便到了现在，我还是讨厌你那一身铜臭味！
t_en: Just as I thought. Even now, I still can't stand that money-grubbing stench of yours!

t_ch: 唉，我愚蠢的妹妹啊，就沉浸在你那不切实际的理想主义里吧。
t_en: *sigh* Oh, my foolish little sister, keep drowning in your unrealistic idealism.

t_ch: 这次的假期很长，我们可以好好规划一下。
t_en: It's a long holiday this time, so let's make some proper plans.

t_ch: 嗯，听说克瑞斯开了家主题餐厅，能同时吃到奥赫玛和悬锋城的特色菜……
t_en: Hmm, I heard Kyros opened a themed restaurant where you can try specialties from both Okhema and Castrum Kremnos...

t_ch: 好，我这就安排上！
t_en: Alright, I'll get right on it!

t_ch: 既然我们在此处相会，想必那伟大的仗已经打完了吧？
t_en: Since we're meeting here, I take it that the great battle is already over?

t_ch: 真是出乎意料，我以为得持续好长时间呢。
t_en: Well, that was unexpected. I thought it would take way longer.

t_ch: 嗝…塔兰顿一点也不公平，欧洛尼斯更是偏心。命运将我们投于纷争的半途，却又使我们无缘参加那场最终战役。
t_en: *hic* Talanton is so unfair, and Oronyx is even more biased. Fate threw us into the midst of strife, yet denied us the chance to join that final battle.

t_ch: 获胜的瞬间，嗝…我也想亲眼看看啊！
t_en: I wish I could've seen that— *hic* —winning moment with my own eyes!

t_ch: 特效拉满，场面震撼人心。
t_en: The special effects are maxed out, and the spectacle is absolutely mind-blowing.

t_ch: 打来打去，场面十分混乱。
t_en: Everyone was fighting back and forth. It was total chaos.

t_ch: 哈哈，无论如何，至少我们尽到了职责。是时候用场庆功宴来犒赏自己了！
t_en: Haha, at least we did our duty. Time to treat ourselves to a celebration feast!

t_ch: 我从旁人那听说了些悬锋城外的美食，可真是琳琅满目，馋得我口水都快流出来了。
t_en: I've heard about all the amazing food outside Castrum Kremnos from others. There's such a mouthwatering variety. I'm practically drooling just thinking about it!

t_ch: 诸位战士听好，庆功宴还差最后一道食材——谁敢同那悬锋的王一样，去弑杀冥海的霸主，让它曾拍碎巨舰的触手成为我们宴席上的佳肴？
t_en: Listen up, warriors! Our victory feast lacks one final ingredient. Who dares to follow in the Kremnoan king's footsteps and slay the overlord of the Sea of Souls? Let's turn those ship-crushing tentacles into tonight's delicacy!

t_ch: 到我出手的时候了！这儿没有战役要奔赴，没有荣耀需要捍卫，从小磨砺的技艺无处施展，我都有些无聊了。
t_en: Time for me to step up! There's no battle to rush to, no glory to defend, and nowhere to show off the skills I've honed since childhood. I'm getting pretty bored here.

t_ch: 呵呵，你？你连和它掰手腕的力气都没有，还是再多练几年吧。征讨它的功勋，只能由我收入囊中。
t_en: Heh, you? You don't even have the strength to arm wrestle with it. Better train for a few more years. The merit of conquering it will be mine alone.

t_ch: 别和我争抢，伙友！
t_en: Don't fight me over this, buddy!

t_ch: 悬锋人向来不用嘴皮子较高低，祭司！
t_en: We Kremnoans don't settle things with mere words, priest!

t_ch: 正合我意！那么，便过两招试试吧——
t_en: Perfect! Then let's see what you've got—

t_ch: 唉…真不明白，只是打个工而已，这种赔上性命的事，有什么可争抢的？
t_en: *sigh* ...I really don't get it. It's just a job. Why are people fighting over something that could cost them their lives?

t_ch: 咳咳。再吵一句，到时候你们两个都不准上桌！
t_en: *Ahem* One more word out of either of you, and neither of you will be allowed at the table!

t_ch: 生面孔，你是刚来的新兵吧？如今我没什么可教你的，唯有一句：别被荣耀的枷锁束缚，去做你想做的事吧。
t_en: New kid, you must be a fresh recruit, huh? I've got nothing much to teach you these days, just one thing: Don't let the shackles of glory hold you back. Go do whatever your heart desires.

t_ch: …唉，假若尼卡多利知道我这么训导新兵，定会降下天谴吧？
t_en: *sigh* If Nikador knew how I was training these recruits, they'd probably smite me from above, wouldn't they?

t_ch: 呵呵…我看未必。
t_en: Heh... I wouldn't be so sure about that.

t_ch: 呵呵呵呵…是什么泥沙让你迷乱了双眼，是何种洋流…让你迷失了方向？
t_en: Hehehe... What grains of sand have clouded your vision, what ocean currents... have made you lose your way?

t_ch: …我能感觉到…你的灵魂，早已不堪重负……
t_en: ...I can sense it... Your soul is already overwhelmed...

t_ch: 住嘴！我的所作所为…不需要一个醉鬼来指指点点。
t_en: Shut up! What I choose to do... needs no drunkard's "wise" advice.

t_ch: 我知道自己在做什么，也知道自己将付出何种代价。
t_en: I know what I'm doing, and I know what price I'll have to pay.

t_ch: 我承担了多少…多少次传承、多少世回忆，只为了，只为了……
t_en: How many... how many inheritances, how many lifetimes of memories have I carried, all for... all for...

t_ch: …为了…为了什么？
t_en: ...F—For... for what?

t_ch: 啊…我看到了！
t_en: Ah... I saw it!

t_ch: 藏在你瞳孔里最深的地方…猩红的血液，从黄金的刀锋跌落。仅仅是一滴，便染红了一整片海洋……
t_en: Deep in the depths of your pupils... crimson blood drips from the Chrysos blade. Just a single drop is enough to dye an entire ocean red...

t_ch: 你啊、你啊，终其一生，被名为「仇恨」的洋流推着走的鱼儿……
t_en: Ah, you... you're just like a fish, forever swept along by the currents of hatred...

t_ch: 不如…就和我一同在欢宴里沉醉…忘记始终折磨你的回忆，忘记刻骨铭心的憎恨，也忘记自己……
t_en: Why don't we... lose ourselves in the revelry together... forget the memories that torment you, forget the deep-seated hatred, and forget yourself...

t_ch: 事到如今，又怎么能忘记？
t_en: How could I forget, after all this time?

t_ch: 啊…先是一个错误。紧接着是数不尽的错误。
t_en: Ah... first there was one mistake. Then came countless others.

t_ch: 克拉特鲁斯爷爷！请再讲讲您和先王那场比拼吧！
t_en: Grandpa Krateros! Please tell us again about your showdown with the late king!

t_ch: 您用盾把绞住先王的矛尖，然后挺出长矛，直刺先王的喉咙——
t_en: You deflected the late king's spear tip with your shield, then thrust your own spear straight at his throat—

t_ch: 对对，就是这一招。请您再使一遍给我们看看吧！
t_en: Yeah yeah, that's the move! Could you show it to us one more time?

t_ch: 呵呵…吟游诗人总爱添油加醋。放过我吧，孩子们，我的身手早不如那时矫健了。
t_en: Heh... Bards always love to embellish their tales. Give me a break, kids. I'm not as spry as I used to be.

t_ch: 克拉特鲁斯、太过谦虚。从未松懈、你多年来。
t_en: Krateros, too modest, you are. Slack off, you've never done, all these years.

t_ch: 是呀，我还想多学几招，将来长大和您一样，成为以一当百的「王翼冠军」！
t_en: Yeah! I want to learn more skills so that when I grow up, I can be just like you... A King's Aegis worth a hundred fighters!

t_ch: 老爷子很有人气。
t_en: The old man's quite popular.

t_ch: 你得多喝点羊奶才行。
t_en: You need to drink more goat milk.

t_ch: 孩子们，站好，挺直身子，回答我：你们缘何想要成为战士？
t_en: Alright, kids, stand up straight and answer me: Why do you want to become warriors?

t_ch: 这…爸爸妈妈从小就这样说：悬锋的孩子是与利刃一同降生的，注定要手执利刃，也注定要死在利刃之下。
t_en: This... My parents always said: Children of Kremnos are born with honed blades, destined to wield the blade, and die by it.

t_ch: 而且，我们也打心里喜欢琢磨招式，操练兵器嘛。
t_en: Besides, we genuinely love figuring out new moves and practicing with weapons.

t_ch: 「喜欢」可是种宽泛的说辞哪。孩子们，能否告诉我，有关「成为战士」，你们的真正的兴趣所在？
t_en: "Like" is quite a broad term, isn't it? Kids, could you tell me what truly interests you about "becoming a warrior"?

t_ch: 唔…我最喜欢看记着黄金世英雄故事的壁画了。我常常用木炭笔，在石砖上自己涂涂画画呢。
t_en: Hmm... I love looking at the murals depicting the heroes of the Era Chrysea. I often use charcoal to doodle and draw on the stone bricks myself.

t_ch: 我喜欢兵器相碰的声音，叮叮当当的，清脆得像下雨！
t_en: I love the sound of clashing weapons, all that clanging and clattering. It's as crisp as rainfall!

t_ch: 德米特里，有没有兴趣学画画？马耳叙阿斯，试试弹水漫琴如何？我会替你们向柯珀丝和弥斯打好招呼。
t_en: Demetri, are you interested in learning to paint? Marsyas, how about trying the water lyre? I'll put in a good word for you with Karpos and Misia.

t_ch: 我呢我呢？我最喜欢盯着铁匠铺看，铁锤每次打在铁胚上，都能蹦出好几个火星子，可有意思了！
t_en: Me! Me! I love watching the blacksmith shop! Every time the hammer hits the iron, sparks fly everywhere. It's so much fun!

t_ch: 呵呵…哈托努斯阁下，这小子恐怕得麻烦你代为教导了。
t_en: Hehe... Lord Chartonus, I'm afraid I'll have to trouble you to mentor this kid.

t_ch: 所托，一定不负。
t_en: Let you down, I won't.

t_ch: 哈哈…这是个不可多得的好机会！
t_en: Haha... This is a golden opportunity!

t_ch: 只要有人的地方，就有政治。能够统率民众、协调需求、解决矛盾的议会，总有一天会重建。早做打算，才能为自己在其中占据一席之地啊！
t_en: Wherever there are people, there's politics. A parliament that can lead the masses, coordinate needs, and resolve conflicts will be rebuilt someday. Better plan ahead if you want to secure your own seat at the table!

t_ch: 你还挺有远见。
t_en: Good foresight.

t_ch: 哼…我可再不想被那群蒙祖荫庇的蠢材指手画脚了。
t_en: Hmph... I'm done having those privileged fools tell me what to do.

t_ch: 能帮我也弄个席位吗？
t_en: Can you get me a spot too?

t_ch: 你？不是不行，但先排队等着吧，来找我商量的人可多着呢。
t_en: You? Well, it's not impossible, but you'll have to get in line. I've got plenty of people wanting to talk business with me.

t_ch: 诸位觉得如何？尤里萨，你来自奥德里西安「门瑟」家，想必在编纂律法上颇有家学渊源，要不要助我一臂之力？
t_en: What do you all think? Ulysse, you're from the Odressian House of Mentes, so you must have quite the family background in law-making. Care to lend me a hand?

t_ch: 呃，为民众谋福利确是贵族义务的一部分，但…说实话，小时候背的那些律法，我早就忘得一干二净了。
t_en: Uh, serving the people's welfare is part of an aristocrat's duty, but... honestly, all those laws I memorized as a kid? Yeah, they're completely gone from my memory now.

t_ch: 埃阿科，你呢？我对你的博识早有耳闻，有没有兴趣和我共举大事？
t_en: Eacus, what about you? I've heard all about your vast knowledge. Care to join me in something big?

t_ch: 抱歉，我没兴趣。先前担任祭司，只是想在乱世里混口饭吃。现在不用考虑这些了，我还是想继续学业，多读些书。
t_en: Sorry, I'm not interested. I only became a priest earlier because I needed to make ends meet during those chaotic times. Now that I don't have to worry about that anymore, I'd rather continue my studies and read more books.

t_ch: 而且，经验告诉我，议会一旦建立，随之而来的又是反对、谋逆、暗杀、战争。元老院里的那些勾当，我见得实在太多太多了。
t_en: And experience tells me that once a parliament is established, it's followed by opposition, treason, assassination, and war. I've seen far too much of those shenanigans in the Council of Elders.

t_ch: 好吧，那我也歇一阵子好了。和来自其他城邦的人聊聊，探望故友，在花园里散散步，也不必担忧哪天黎明再也不会到来……
t_en: Alright then, I'll take a break too. Chat with folks from other city-states, visit old friends, take strolls in the garden... and not have to worry about the dawn never coming again...

t_ch: 或许，就这样也不错。
t_en: Maybe this isn't so bad after all.

t_ch: 唉…我想像往常一样祈祷，但现如今还能向谁祷告呢？
t_en: *sigh* I want to pray like I used to, but who is there left to pray to nowadays?

t_ch: 花点心思四处看看吧，刻法勒从未离我们而去。
t_en: Take a good look around. Kephale has never truly left us.

t_ch: 感谢你们的好意，但我这幅身躯由笨重石料铸就，比起宴会，更适合在战场上起舞。
t_en: I'm grateful for the thought, but my stone-forged body was made to dance in battle, not during banquets.

t_ch: 可别这么说，猎手小姐，瞧你那有力的线条、健美的曲线——优雅、太优雅了！
t_en: Miss Archer, please don't say that! Those powerful contours and athletic curves you have are simply magnificent!

t_ch: 这场聚会就是特地为你举办的，猎手小姐，请务必出席！拜托了，这是所有人的请求！
t_en: We're throwing this party especially for you, Miss Archer! Please come! Everyone's asking for you!

t_ch: 什么宴会，算我一个？
t_en: A party? Well, count me in!

t_ch: 有热闹的地方怎么能没有我！
t_en: What's a party without me around?

t_ch: 来，都可以来…嚯！这不是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄吗？真是百闻不如一见。
t_en: Sure, everyone's welcome... Wait, aren't you the great hero who saved Amphoreus! The stories don't do you justice at all!

t_ch: 什么？快让我瞧瞧——整天听老爹夸你，今天终于让我见到活的了！
t_en: Really? I wanna see! Dad never stops talking about you, and I finally get to see the real deal!

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我来介绍一下：这两位是费贝尔老爹的女儿；这是德墨忒尔婶婶家的波瑟芬妮；还有这位，来自悬锋城的天谴猎手小姐。
t_en: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. Allow me to make introductions. These lovely ladies are Old Fabio's daughters. This is Possephone from Aunt Demetria's family. And this distinguished warrior is the Furiae Archer from Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 感谢你所做的一切，翁法罗斯的大英雄，向你致敬。
t_en: Thank you, great hero of Amphoreus, for everything you've done.

t_ch: 总算让我见到活的了！
t_en: The real deal! In the flesh!

t_ch: 哎，你这人真有意思，这招呼还能打得有来有往的。
t_en: Well now, you really know how to keep up your end of a conversation.

t_ch: 这场是熟人局啊…
t_en: Looks like everyone here already knows each other.

t_ch: 你是…为什么我觉得你有些熟悉，却想不起究竟何时见过……
t_en: You seem... familiar. I feel as though we've met, but I cannot place when or where.

t_ch: 原来两位也认识吗？那就更该来一场宴会了！交给我们姐妹俩，你们就放心吧——保证歌舞不歇，秘酿不限，让大家都玩得尽兴！
t_en: So you two know each other, too? That makes a party even more necessary! Just leave it to us sisters. We'll keep the music playing, the dancing going, and the ambrosia flowing until everyone's had their fill of fun!

t_ch: 要是猎手小姐对这些都没兴趣，我们还有小型的体育竞技赛，保证不教你无聊！
t_en: If that's not your style, Miss Archer, we've got some small-scale athletic competitions that might be more to your liking!

t_ch: …我这身铠甲乃为杀戮而生，倘若损伤到那些参赛者……
t_en: My armor was made for battle. If I accidentally harm someone participating...

t_ch: 嗨，没关系，我们曳石学派和那些运动员都身强体健的，不怕磕碰！
t_en: Don't worry about that! We Helkolithists are tough as nails, and so are the athletes!

t_ch: 这次宴会，我想准备些美味的吃食去分享，猎手小姐可以和我一起吗？
t_en: I was planning to bring some treats for everyone at the party. Would you mind helping me with the cooking, Miss Archer?
...All right.

t_ch: 你的手艺谁不夸…咦？你答应啦！太好了，我们这就加紧筹备，在场的可都要来啊！
t_en: Everyone loves your cooking... Wait, you said yes!? That's great! We'll start preparing now. Everyone here is officially invited!

t_ch: 厄琉斯，我的厄琉斯…即便黑潮与死亡也无法将我们分开……
t_en: Aelius, my beloved Aelius... Not even the black tide and death could do us part...

t_ch: 宁芙，我的宁芙…你与我注定在新世界中长相厮守……
t_en: Nympha, my beloved Nympha... Our destiny is to be together forever in the new world...

t_ch: 嘶…这个提议值得考虑……
t_en: Hmm... This idea might be worth exploring.

t_ch: 嗯…如此有趣且契合的灵魂倒是不多见……
t_en: Indeed... Such fascinating and compatible souls are rare to find...

t_ch: 吾师，别冲动，你再好好想想！
t_en: Sir, please! You have to think this through!

t_ch: 嗨，朋友，没想到还能与你再见。就说我们的缘分连扎格列斯都要保佑！眼下正有趣事发生，你不妨留下来瞧个热闹——只要区区五十利衡币哦~
t_en: Hello there, my friend! What a pleasant surprise seeing you here! Even Zagreus must be smiling on our continued acquaintance! Something interesting is happening right now. Why not stick around for the show? It'll only cost you <unbreak>50</unbreak> Balance Coins~

t_ch: 还是熟悉的奸商…
t_en: Still working your sneaky angles, I see...

t_ch: 诶呀，不用不用，我只是开个玩笑，见到你太高兴了嘛。
t_en: Oh come now, I was just joking! I'm just happy to see you again.

t_ch: 这块地是你家的？不给！
t_en: You're charging me for standing here? Nice try!

t_ch: 哈哈，我只是开个玩笑。见到你太高兴了嘛。
t_en: Haha, I was just joking! I'm just happy to see you again.

t_ch: 我就说这人不靠谱，老师，他拿咱们当乐子呢——不是说你啊，英雄——这蓝头发的就是这个奸商！
t_en: See, sir? This person can't be trusted. He's making fools of us — not you, of course, hero — I'm talking about this blue-haired con artist!

t_ch: 这可就冤枉我喽。我就是觉得啊，老先生有见识有智慧，年轻人有勇气有家底，相辅相成嘛，做起事来肯定事半功倍。
t_en: Now that's unfair! I'm just saying that when you combine the old man's wisdom with the young fellow's boldness and resources, you get a winning combination. You two could move mountains together!

t_ch: 我只是个虔诚求知的无知老头。不过你说得对，我确实愿为新世界献出一份力量。
t_en: I'm just a simple old fellow thirsty for knowledge, but you make a good point. I do want to do my part for this new world taking shape.

t_ch: 理解理解，更何况…两位一个敢为难民盗物资，一个敢在神殿取贡品，又何尝不是种意气相投呢？
t_en: Right, right. And besides... when one of you is brave enough to steal supplies for refugees, while the other dares to take offerings from temples... doesn't that sounds like two birds of a feather?

t_ch: 你这人乱说什么呢——
t_en: That's a wild accusation—

t_ch: 没错！难得有人能理解我所践行的律法，我决定与苏克提瑞斯先生成为忘年交！
t_en: Exactly! Finally someone who actually understand the laws I uphold. For this, Mr. Soctires and I shall be friends for the ages — literally!

t_ch: 至于你，年轻的先生，考虑到你资历尚浅，我建议你还是帮这二位多跑跑腿吧。
t_en: As for you, mister, with your limited credentials, I think you're best suited as the assistant to these distinguished gentlemen.

t_ch: …连我都安排好了是吧？还有，你骂谁呢！
t_en: ...You've given me a job without my consent, huh? Just exactly who do you think you're patronizing right now?

t_ch: 怎么能说骂呢，难道你歧视后勤工作吗？再说了，作为弟子，你难道不想继承老师的衣钵，继续造福人民吗？
t_en: Patronizing? What? Is being an assistant beneath you? Besides, shouldn't a good disciple want to follow their master's footsteps and continue their noble work?

t_ch: 你…你这家伙……
t_en: Y-You... unbelievable...

t_ch: 扎格列斯信徒，纯的。
t_en: You Zagreus disciple, zealous as they come.

t_ch: 这就给你写酒馆的推荐信…
t_en: I'll write you a Tavern recommendation letter right now...

t_ch: 多谢夸奖，朋友！既然末日已经过去，我也得重新给自己找些乐子了……
t_en: I appreciate the kind words, friend! With the apocalypse behind us, I'm on the lookout for fresh amusements...

t_ch: 对了，你们的「探险队」什么时候打算再招收新人？我会踊跃报名的哦。
t_en: Speaking of which, when will your "expedition team" be accepting new recruits? I'd be very interested in signing up.

t_ch: 咱们搞研究的，就是要不怕苦不怕累，一步一个脚印，将那些繁文缛节统统抛弃！
t_en: As researchers, we can't shy away from hard work. We must take things step by step and throw away all those unnecessary formalities!

t_ch: 这位朋友，我见你颇有资质啊，有没有兴趣了解一下我们「曳石学派」？
t_en: I see great potential in you, my friend. Perhaps you'd be interested in Helkolithism?

t_ch: 你、你们别太过分！雅努萨波利斯祭司的声誉岂容你们这般玷污…啊——我记得你，异乡的贵客！
t_en: Y-You people are going too far! The reputation of the Janusopolis Priests is not to be sullied by the likes of you! Ah — wait, I recognize you, distinguished guest from afar!

t_ch: 这帮牙尖嘴利的野兽正在围攻命运泰坦虔诚的侍者，请务必为我主持公道！
t_en: These sharp-tongued savages are attacking a devoted servant of the Fate Titans! I implore you to intervene and restore justice!

t_ch: 哟，我还以为这老东西逮到哪个大靠山了呢。好久不见啊，年轻人，来都来了，有没有兴趣当当「一日塔兰顿」啊？
t_en: And here I thought this antique had found himself a powerful friend. Long time no see, young hero. Since you're here, fancy stepping in as our One-Day Talanton today?

t_ch: 主持公道，我义不容辞！
t_en: Justice must be served, and I'm ready to help!

t_ch: 啥玩意？我就是路过……
t_en: Huh? I was just minding my own business...

t_ch: 我看你现在也没什么急事，来来来，就给这老东西*评评理*，回头我让德墨忒尔给你拿果子吃。
t_en: I don't see you in a hurry. Just help us *knock some sense* into this antique, and I'll make sure Demetria rewards you with her finest fruits.

t_ch: 你、你们认识？这…不行，谁能保证{F#她}{M#他}不会有所偏颇……
t_en: Y-You know each other? This... changes everything. Who's to say {F#she}{M#he} wouldn't take sides...

t_ch: 我，塔兰顿祭司；这边的老头，雅努斯祭司；那边的小姑娘，欧洛尼斯的圣女——
t_en: Get this straight: I am Talanton's Priest; this old gentleman here is Janus's Priest; and that young lady over there is the Holy Maiden of Oronyx...

t_ch: 这是强词夺理！让你这样粗俗蛮横的人当祭司，简直有辱塔兰顿的威严……
t_en: Absolute blasphemy! Having someone as crass as you being Talanton's priest brings great shame to that Titan...

t_ch: 我看强词夺理的是你才对，若论起对神明的虔敬，你比这位塔兰顿祭司相差甚远！
t_en: Look who's talking about blasphemy! If the Titans measured faith now, you wouldn't even register next to this faithful priest of Talanton!

t_ch: 这就破防了？我还没开始骂人呢。别以为高级祭司是个多尊贵的身份，没了圣女大人，你们什么也不是。
t_en: That rattled you already? I haven't even started cursing yet. Being a high priest doesn't make you noble. Without the Holy Maiden, you are nothing.

t_ch: 等会，怎么还有圣女的事？
t_en: Hold up, what's this about a Holy Maiden?

t_ch: 展开说说？
t_en: Care to elaborate?

t_ch: 虽然我与圣女大人并不…熟识，但我敬佩她的勇气与决断。而如今，人们能在和平的世界里欢聚，诸位黄金裔更是功不可没。所以我希望你能保持对她的尊重。
t_en: Though I may not be... well acquainted with the Holy Maiden, I admire her courage and decisiveness. Now that people can gather in peace, much of the credit goes to the Chrysos Heirs. So I hope you show her the respect she deserves.

t_ch: 小丫头，注意你的措辞！污蔑祭司可是大罪——
t_en: Watch your words, brat! Slandering a priest is a serious offense—

t_ch: 得了吧，玩弄权势、操纵流言，利用神谕和供奉捞钱。别以为我们不知道你做过什么！
t_en: Save it! You've been abusing your power, spreading rumors, and using prophecies and offerings for fraud. Don't think we don't know what you've done!

t_ch: 刚才那句话也还给你：让你这样道貌岸然的虫豸当祭司，简直有辱命运三泰坦的威严！
t_en: I could throw those words right back at you. Letting a sanctimonious worm like you serve as a priest disgraces the dignity of the Three Titans of Fate!

t_ch: 命运如此厚待，我、我该如何证明自己的感激与虔诚……
t_en: Fate has been so kind to me... H-How can I ever prove my gratitude and devotion...

t_ch: 放心吧，命运的泰坦们，一定如同我们的圣女大人那般温柔！
t_en: Fear not! The Titans of Fate are surely as gentle as our Holy Maiden!

t_ch: 感谢命运的眷顾！能亲眼见证这新世界，老夫的人生也算圆满了呐！
t_en: Thank the blessings of fate! To witness this new world with my own eyes, my life is truly complete!

t_ch: 我就知道，神明总会垂青虔诚的信徒——赞美今日的和平与安宁！
t_en: I knew it! The gods always smile upon their devout followers. Let's give praise to the peace and tranquility today!
*sigh* ...
*sigh* ...

t_ch: 你们俩差不多得了啊，还有完没完了！
t_en: You two, that's enough already! When are you gonna stop!?

t_ch: 唉…
t_en: *sigh* ...

t_ch: 我不是说…等等，您哪位？
t_en: I said... wait, who are you?

t_ch: 怎么一个个唉声叹气的？
t_en: Why is everyone sighing?

t_ch: 啊，是你！又见面了——几位，这是{NICKNAME}，在树庭遭难后帮我调查的那位好心人，也是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄！
t_en: Ah, it's you! We meet again. Everyone, this is {NICKNAME}, the kind soul who helped me investigate after the disaster at the Grove, and the great hero who saved Amphoreus!

t_ch: 就是你吗？好厉害，和我之前看过的一部小说里的主角好像——
t_en: Is it really you? That's amazing, you're just like the protagonist from a novel I read!

t_ch: 年纪轻轻就拯救世界？太酷了！
t_en: Saving the world at such a young age? That's so cool!

t_ch: 多亏了你，我们推理协会才能有重聚的一天！不过…这才团聚没多久，唉……
t_en: Thanks to you, our Deduction Society finally reunited! But... we've only just gotten back together, and now... *sigh*

t_ch: 原本四个人的社团，就变成了两两的组合。认识了这么多年，你们竟然！唉……
t_en: We used to be a club of four, but now it's split into pairs. After all these years together, I can't believe you two... *sigh*

t_ch: 别唉了！这不是告诉你们了吗？
t_en: How many times do I have to tell you!? Stop sighing!

t_ch: 你还好意思说，棍球打得好好的，突然告诉我订婚的消息！赔我输掉的利衡币！
t_en: What audacity! We were having a great stickball game when you suddenly dropped your engagement news! You owe me the Balance Coins I lost!

t_ch: 就是，在我俩面前讲你们的爱情故事，良心都不会痛的吗？
t_en: Seriously, yapping all about your love story right in front of us? Don't you have any conscience?

t_ch: 还是别管这两人了。对了，{NICKNAME}，下个月我打算和尼科马库斯订婚，你要有时间的话，可以来参加宴会吗？
t_en: Let's just ignore those two. Oh right, {NICKNAME}, I'm planning to get engaged to Nicomachus next month. If you have time, would you like to come to the celebration?

t_ch: …我们原本至死都未有机会向对方表露真心，谢谢您。
t_en: ...We might never have had the chance to confess our feelings if not for you. Thank you.

t_ch: 没想到还有机会沐浴新世界的曙光…曾经那些末日景象，如今回看，竟好似一场逐渐消弭的噩梦……
t_en: Never thought I'd have the chance to bask in the dawn of a new world... Looking back now, those apocalyptic scenes feel like a nightmare slowly fading away...

t_ch: 是啊，难得悠闲，我又恰好带着里拉琴，为你弹奏一曲如何？
t_en: Yeah, it's rare to have such leisure time. And since I happen to have my lyre with me, how about I play you a tune?

t_ch: 你听听这个…黑土好，充饥快！黄土好，治馋病！
t_en: How about this... Blacksoil's good, it fills you up quick! Yellowsoil's good, it cures your cravings!

t_ch: 这些广告效果是自己品出来的吗？
t_en: Did you come up with these ad slogans yourself?

t_ch: 呜嗡——
t_en: Grumph—

t_ch: 大地兽提出了反对意见…
t_en: A dromas raised its objection...

t_ch: 您说得确实在理，可我们听不懂……
t_en: You make a good point, but we have no idea what you're saying...

t_ch: 红土好，我吃过！
t_en: Redsoil's good, I've tried it!

t_ch: 您吃过有什么用啊！哎呀，您是……
t_en: What's the point of having eaten it before! Oh wait, you're...

t_ch: 什么意思嘛，难道说你们觉得黑土和黄土在大地兽眼中没有市场？
t_en: What are you trying to say? That dromas doesn't see any value in blacksoil and yellowsoil?

t_ch: 就算为了带货也不能鼓吹它的效果呀，您看，我跟这位寻土人先生一直争执不下。
t_en: Even if it's for promotion, you can't just make up its effects. Look, I've been arguing with this Earth Scout over it the whole time.

t_ch: 问问大地兽，看它喜欢什么？
t_en: Ask the dromases what they like?

t_ch: 这种事不自己吃过没法证明…
t_en: You can't prove it until you've tried it yourself...

t_ch: 真的会有人吃土吗？
t_en: Do people actually eat dirt?

t_ch: 我们喂过不同的款式，结果它们来者不拒。
t_en: We've fed them all kinds, and they gobbled up every batch without hesitation.

t_ch: 没错，说不定这些土是什么颜色一点差别都没有，更别说什么无糖款了——
t_en: Right. For all we know, these dirt clumps might not differ regardless of their colors. And calling them "sugar-free"? That's pushing it—

t_ch: 这是有区别的，你要是不信，我这里还有树庭买到的「大地兽语翻译器」，我们问问！
t_en: There's definitely a difference! If you don't believe me, I've got this "dromas translator" I bought from the Grove. Let's ask!

t_ch: 你早说你有这种东西，我们还用在这里吵来吵去吗？
t_en: Why didn't you say you had that earlier? We wouldn't have spent all this time arguing!

t_ch: ——科可波三世，黑土和黄土你喜欢哪个？
t_en: Kokopo III, tell us, which do you prefer: blacksoil or yellowsoil?

t_ch: 呜嗡。
t_en: Grumph.

t_ch: 我看看——「嗯…」
t_en: Let me see: "Hmm..."
...Huh?

t_ch: …半分钟就蹦出一个字啊？
t_en: ...Taking half a minute just to get one word out?

t_ch: …它还在继续翻译。
t_en: ...It's still translating.

t_ch: …我不该把它拿出来的。
t_en: ...I shouldn't have taken it out.

t_ch: 黑黄配比七三，门扉时和离愁时各一次，另寻悬锋土。同意？
t_en: Mix black and yellow at a ratio of 7:3. Use it once during the Entry Hour and once during the Parting Hour. Then find some Kremnos soil. Agreed?

t_ch: 同意，就这么办吧……
t_en: Agreed, let's do that then...
Grumphhhhh—

t_ch: 嚯，大家伙。很高兴你还认得我们。
t_en: Whoa, big guy. Glad you still remember us.

t_ch: 我还记得你第一次浑身是伤地出现在奥赫玛门口的时候，背上还背了两个伤员，当时可把我们吓坏了。
t_en: I still remember when you showed up at Okhema's gate for the first time, all banged up with two injured people on your back. Scared the life out of us back then.

t_ch: 两位卫兵阁下！想必你们对《大地兽赫拉克勒斯与十二试炼》合订版会感兴趣——
t_en: My dear guards! I'm sure you'd be interested in the bound edition of Twelve Labors of Dromas Heracles—

t_ch: 谢了朋友，我确实挺有兴趣的，但我们已经看过太多遍了…抱歉。
t_en: Thanks, friend. I'm quite interested indeed, but we've seen it way too many times already... Sorry.

t_ch: 合订版好像有新的插画。
t_en: The bound edition comes with new illustrations.

t_ch: 哦…那，何乐不为呢？多少利衡币？
t_en: Oh... well, why not? How many Balance Coins?

t_ch: 不必，二位拿好！记得多来看看大地兽们！
t_en: No need! Here, take it! Just remember to visit the dromases more often!
Grumphhhhh—

t_ch: 吃？
t_en: Food?

t_ch: 吃。
t_en: Eat.

t_ch: 老样子？
t_en: The usual?

t_ch: 好。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 唉，英雄阁下，您瞧，不管听多少遍，我还是理解不了这种简洁的交流方式…
t_en: Alas, dear hero, no matter how many times I hear it, I still can't wrap my head around this... concise way of speaking...

t_ch: 这就是熟人对话。
t_en: That's how friends talk.

t_ch: 你说的有道理，是我太过在意了。
t_en: You're right, I was thinking too much into it.

t_ch: 多听，就会了。
t_en: Just keep listening, you'll get it.

t_ch: 话，是这样，没错。
t_en: Indeed. You. Right.

t_ch: 下一次演讲的主题是「探寻山之食堂」，在那之前，我得让这些沉默的大家伙认识我。
t_en: My next lecture's theme is "Exploring the Mountain's Diner." But before that, I need to get acquainted with these silent giants first.

t_ch: …卫兵阁下们！听说您终于转型成功，开了个小食堂？
t_en: ...Esteemed guards! I heard you finally changed careers and opened a little diner?

t_ch: 错，不是卫兵，是厨子。
t_en: Wrong, not a guard, a cook.

t_ch: 先吃饭，吃完再说。西塞罗，拿着，角猪串。
t_en: Eat first, then talk. Here, Cicero. Take, hornswine skewer.

t_ch: …好吃？
t_en: ...Yummy?

t_ch: 我还没吃呢！我是在惊讶，你已经认识我了？
t_en: I haven't eaten yet! I was just surprised you already knew who I was.

t_ch: 认识。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 太让人感动了！我去取真正的{RUBY_B#蜜酿}法吉娜的祝福{RUBY_E#}来！我们再多聊聊，我还以为你们不愿意和我说话呢！
t_en: I'm moved! I'm going to get the real {RUBY_B#honey brew}Phagousa's Blessing{RUBY_E#}! I thought you didn't want to talk to me, but let's chat more!

t_ch: 聊呗，来食堂，聊。
t_en: Sure. Come diner. Chat.

t_ch: 它，话唠。
t_en: This one. Chatterbox.

t_ch: 英雄，有空的话，也来。
t_en: Hero, join. If free.

t_ch: 唉，你不知道我的经历有多离谱，我的应激症状恐怕治不好了。
t_en: *sigh* You have no idea how absurd my experience was. I fear my trauma cannot be healed.

t_ch: 有空的话，来我家给我女儿讲讲？她可愿意听这些传奇故事了……
t_en: If you have the time, could you come to my place and tell those stories to my daughter? She really loves hearing tales like that...

t_ch: 到头来，你们都清闲了，就我还是这么忙。
t_en: In the end, you all get to take it easy while I'm still swamped with work.

t_ch: 这没办法，老朋友。无论天地如何剧变，人们对秘酿的渴求始终如初。
t_en: Can't help it, old friend. No matter how drastically the world changes, people's thirst for ambrosia remains the same.

t_ch: 其他秘酿主理人也都忙前忙后，酣饮处热闹得像是曾经的斯缇科西亚城一样。
t_en: While other Ambrosia Managers are bustling about, the drinking spot is as lively as what Styxia used to be.

t_ch: 忙碌许久，突然空下来，反而不知道该做什么好了，只能盯着云石天宫的瀑布发呆。
t_en: After being busy for so long, I don't even know what to do with myself now that I suddenly have free time. All I could do is just sit here staring blankly at the waterfall of Marmoreal Palace.

t_ch: 该享受漫长的假期啦。
t_en: Time to enjoy a long vacation!

t_ch: 你们浴场怎么打烊了？
t_en: Why are your baths closed?

t_ch: 嗯，损毁得很严重，继续营业实在太过勉强了。
t_en: Hmm, the damage is pretty severe. It'd be pushing it to keep operating like this.

t_ch: 喔，贵客来了！怎么样，陪我们去痛饮一番？
t_en: Oh, look who's here! How about joining us for some drinks?

t_ch: 还是别理他们了，我知道这些秘酿傻瓜脑子里在想什么——「重要的是喝掉下一杯！」
t_en: Just ignore them. I know what these ambrosia fools have in mind — "All that matters is the next drink!"

t_ch: 哈哈，喝！贵客来了，可不得喝点嘛。
t_en: Haha, bottoms up! When an honored guest arrives, we've gotta have a drink!

t_ch: 主理人，我记得你常念叨着「秘酿的醇香，还得配上浴场的水蒸气」？
t_en: Manager, didn't you always say ambrosia's rich aroma is best savored with the steam of the baths?

t_ch: 话是这么说，现在不是没这条件了吗。
t_en: That's all well and good, but we don't really have those conditions anymore.

t_ch: 那么，如果云石天宫修缮完成…呢？
t_en: So, what if the Marmoreal Palace is fully restored...?

t_ch: 说两句话嘛，大家心里不都这么想的吗？
t_en: Come on, say something! We're all thinking the same thing, aren't we?

t_ch: 我可不好意思麻烦你们这些客人。
t_en: I wouldn't want to trouble guests like you.

t_ch: 我也是……
t_en: Me too...

t_ch: 也没什么不妥吧？奥赫玛城就是在几百光历年里无数次修缮翻新，才维持至今的。
t_en: What's wrong with that? Okhema has only survived to this day through countless renovations and repairs over hundreds of Light Calendar years.

t_ch: 既然都说到这里了，哈哈！我认识一些力气比较大的常客们！
t_en: Since we're on the topic, haha! I know some regulars who pack quite a punch!

t_ch: …好吧，要费多少事我可不管了——算我一个。
t_en: ...Fine, I don't care how much trouble it'll be — count me in.

t_ch: 这就是所谓一拍即合吧，咱们说干就干。
t_en: Talk about hitting it off! Let's get this show on the road.

t_ch: 伊克西翁，你说你要公布个秘密，现在人都到了，连大英雄也在这里，你就讲讲吧。
t_en: Ixion, you said you had a secret to reveal. Now that everyone's here, including our great hero, why don't you tell us about it?

t_ch: 听了可别吓到！我啊，终于！偷溜进黄金裔浴场了！
t_en: Don't freak out! It's just that... I, I finally snuck into the Chrysos Heir's baths!

t_ch: 恭喜你。
t_en: Congratulations.

t_ch: 恭喜。
t_en: Congratulations.

t_ch: 恭喜。然后呢…
t_en: Congrats. And then...?

t_ch: …还以为是什么要紧事呢？
t_en: ...And here I thought it was something important.

t_ch: …不是，你把大家叫出来，就为了这事啊？
t_en: ...Wait, you called everyone here just for this?

t_ch: 我也不是故意的，我是…我是迫不得已，*不小心*踏入了黄金裔浴池。
t_en: I didn't mean to. I... I had no choice and somehow *accidentally* stepped into the Chrysos Heir's bath.

t_ch: 那地方，正如我想象地那般神秘，幽静，深邃……
t_en: That place was just as mysterious, tranquil, and profound as I had imagined...

t_ch: 我记得那里朝阳，怎么会幽静深邃嘛？
t_en: I remember there was sunlight there. How could it be so tranquil and profound?

t_ch: 别打断我，我是在说一种心理的感受！
t_en: Don't interrupt me, I'm trying to express my feelings here!

t_ch: 没有卫兵阻拦我，也没有人对我进行斥责！果然，我体内流淌着红色的金血啊——
t_en: No guards stopped me, and nobody scolded me! Just as I thought, red gold blood indeed flows through my veins!

t_ch: 好好好，没事了，大家散了吧。
t_en: Alright, alright, it's not a big deal, everyone. You may leave now.

t_ch: 趁此机会，阿波罗尼娅女士，之前提到关于密铺的改进——
t_en: Speaking of which, Ms. Apollonia, about those improvements to the tessellation mentioned earlier—

t_ch: 我很高兴您也对此感兴趣，工匠阁下。换个地方进一步细聊吧。
t_en: I'm glad you're interested in this too, Mr. Craftsman. Let's move somewhere else to discuss the details.

t_ch: 啊啊，要是早点发现自己的隐藏属性，我就能替大家守护好浴场了…啊，不灭的金血，从此时开始发光发热吧！
t_en: Ahhh, if only I'd discovered my hidden ability earlier, I could've protected the baths for everyone... Ah, indestructible golden blood, it's time for you to shine and burn bright!

t_ch: 哟！来，跟我一起！健身！锻体！赞美悬锋军！
t_en: Yo! Come on, work out with me! Let's get fit! All hail the Kremnos Army!

t_ch: 都听小大哥的！有了正确的训练法，效果明显多了！我总算能赶上潮流了！
t_en: I'll follow your lead, big bro! With the right training method, the results are way more obvious! I can finally keep up with the trends!

t_ch: 坚持不懈，你就是最潮的肌肉美男！
t_en: Keep at it, and you'll be the hottest beefcake around!

t_ch: 咪发迷！你竟然自己一只妖精，偷偷溜到村子外的野地里，你知道我们多担心吗！
t_en: Mifamem! How dare you sneak out to the wilderness outside the village all by yourself! Do you have any idea how worried we were about you!?

t_ch: 我知道，每只妖精对未知都有一探究竟的好奇心，但无论如何，不许踏入那片幽邃的森林，是迷路迷境永恒的禁令哪！
t_en: I know every fairy has a burning curiosity about the unknown, but entering that deep Forest is strictly forbidden. It's a permanent ban in Membrance Maze!

t_ch: 抱、抱歉，村长，我再也不敢了！
t_en: S-sorry, Village Chief! I won't do it again!

t_ch: 呼…我现在相信了迷，村长滔天的怒火，确实能毁灭七分之六个世界迷……
t_en: Phew... Now I believe it. The Chief's outrage really could destroy six-sevenths of the world...

t_ch: 你都去了哪些地方呢？
t_en: Where have you been?

t_ch: 我在最远的林子里爬上一座小丘，然后抓着蒲公英降落，总算越过了那些长着尖刺的灌木和荆棘。
t_en: I climbed a small hill in the farthest woods and then grabbed onto a dandelion to float down, before finally making it past those prickly bushes and thorns.

t_ch: 爬上小丘就可以跨过灌木…原来如此迷……
t_en: Climb up that small hill to get past the bushes... So that's how it works...

t_ch: 越过边境之后，沿着溪流一直走，就能来到一片平坦的原野。一到晚上，总有绿莹莹的光点飞舞，像星星一样！
t_en: After crossing the border, follow the stream, and you'll reach a vast, flat plain. When night falls, there are always these glowing green dots dancing around, just like stars!

t_ch: 沿着溪流一直走，是一片平坦的原野……
t_en: Following along the stream, there's a vast, flat plain...

t_ch: 村长，你在记什么迷？
t_en: Chief, what's got you so lost in thought?

t_ch: 呵呵…其实村长我，心里至今也还怀着一个冒险的梦哪……
t_en: Heh heh... Truth is, I still harbor a dream of adventure even today...

t_ch: 你错过了餐馆的开张！
t_en: You missed the restaurant's grand opening!

t_ch: 是啊，想起香喷喷的缤纷沙拉、南瓜甜饼、香汁烤鸡…我就要流口水了哪！
t_en: Yeah, just thinking about that fragrant Colorful Salad, pumpkin pie, and juicy roast chicken... I'm already drooling!

t_ch: 每、每道菜我都想吃迷！那家餐馆还在吗？
t_en: Oh my gosh, I want to try every single dish! Is that restaurant still there?

t_ch: 一切都已经随风而逝了…
t_en: It's all gone with the wind now...

t_ch: 那么，咪发迷要做一个追逐风的旅客，去捕捉最后一丝菜香迷！
t_en: Well then, Mifamem shall become a traveler chasing the wind, to catch that last whiff of delicious aroma!

t_ch: 还在的，这是常驻活动。
t_en: Yes, it's still there. This is a permanent event.

t_ch: 太好了，我的钱包已经准备就位了迷！
t_en: Awesome, my wallet is ready and raring to go!

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 喏，这顶帽子。我出发前向田地里的稻草人借的，它很慷慨，没有拒绝。
t_en: Here, this hat. I borrowed it from a scarecrow in the fields before I left. It was quite generous and didn't refuse me.

t_ch: 迷…它应该也没有同意吧？
t_en: Hmm... I don't think it agreed either, did it?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，现在我把它转交给你——我同意了迷！
t_en: Hehe, I'm handing it over to you now — You have my permission!

t_ch: 算了算了，孩子没事就好。
t_en: Forget it, I'm just glad you're alright.

t_ch: 村长放心，我保证——下次出发前，一定会叫上你的迷！
t_en: Don't worry, Chief! I promise - next time before I head out, I'll definitely bring you along!

t_ch: 你这孩子，完全没听进去我的话哪……
t_en: Kid, you're not listening to a word I'm saying...

t_ch: 好久没接到花园的工作，是没什么要帮忙的，还是找到了更优秀的团队嗷呜？
t_en: Haven't gotten any garden work in a while. Is there nothing to help out with, or did you find a better team awoo?

t_ch: 这可不行！坚持自我激励、自我约束，贯彻自由与自律理念的团队，若是失去了挑战目标，就会很快变得松懈，在不知不觉间落后嗷呜！
t_en: That won't do! A team that prides itself on self-motivation and self-discipline, embracing both freedom and discipline, will quickly become slack without a goal. And before you know it, we'll fall behind!

t_ch: 我得赶快给团队里的成员，找些新事情做……
t_en: I need to find some new tasks for my team members ASAP...

t_ch: 别卷了…
t_en: Stop being such a tryhard...

t_ch: 工作的事，怎么能叫卷呢？这是纯粹的热爱嗷呜！
t_en: Professionalism is nothing like tryhard. Everything is out of pure passion awoo!

t_ch: 没有工作不是好事吗？
t_en: Isn't it a good thing to have no work?

t_ch: 好事？我只觉得工作的热情无处释放，很是憋闷嗷呜……
t_en: Good thing? I just feel like I have all this pent-up work enthusiasm with nowhere to release it. It's so frustrating awoo...

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 嗷呜？想要的话，这个就送给你吧，在工作里派不上什么用场。
t_en: Awoo? If you want it, you can have it. It's not really useful for work anyway.

t_ch: 除了很可爱…真的很可爱…嗷呜……
t_en: This is not only adorable... but really... adorable, awoo...

t_ch: 嗷呜，和你这样的工作冠军没什么好说的。就是糖衣炮弹，想让我们掉以轻心！
t_en: Awoo, there's no point arguing with a workaholic like you. It's just a sugar-coated trap trying to let our guard down!

t_ch: 闲得浑身难受。莫非…生命花园已经不需要奇美拉了嗷呜？
t_en: I'm so bored I can't stand it. Could it be... that the Garden of Life doesn't need this chimera anymore? Awoo?

t_ch: 呜嗡！（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！这里有好多熟人啊， 大家是打算烧烤吗？那我负责吃！…不对，我吃的主要是土来着。）
t_en: Grumph! ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}! There are so many familiar faces here! Are we having a barbecue? Great! I'll be in charge of eating! ...Wait, didn't I mostly eat soil?)

t_ch: 跟它玩一玩。
t_en: Play with it.

t_ch: 呜嗡？（我最近学会了后空翻，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你要看吗？可以多带几个人来哦。）
t_en: Grumph. (I just learned how to do a backflip, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}! Wanna see? You can bring a whole crowd to watch!)

t_ch: 和它抢土吃。
t_en: Fight with it over soil.

t_ch: 呜嗡！（不可以哦，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}会把肚子吃坏的！）
t_en: Grumph! (Nope! That'll upset your tummy, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

t_ch: 呜嗡。（如果是馋了的话，可以去咬旁边的奇美拉。）
t_en: Grumph. (If you're just feeling snacky, go chew on that chimera over there.)

t_ch: 摸摸孩子的脑瓜。
t_en: Pet its head.

t_ch: 呜嗡！（好痒，好痒——哈哈哈——）
t_en: Gruuuuumph! (That tickles! Hahaha—)

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡。（呜，还好我是大地兽，本来就没有头发。不然迟早要被{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}摸秃不可。）
t_en: Grumph. (Phew, good thing I'm a dromas and don't have hair. Otherwise, {F#Mama}{M#Papa} would've petted me bald by now.)

t_ch: 问问它最近有什么新鲜事？
t_en: Ask if anything new's happened lately.

t_ch: 呜嗡！（上次我把一个树庭学生的作业石板吃掉了！）
t_en: Grumph! (Last time I ate a Grove student's homework slate!)

t_ch: 呜嗡！（他说他很感谢我，因为这件事让他懂得了「有时候就算说实话，大家也不会相信」这个道理。）
t_en: Grumph! (He said he was grateful to me, because this incident taught him that "sometimes even when you tell the truth, people won't believe you anyway.")

t_ch: 那就来个后空翻！
t_en: Let's do a backflip!

t_ch: 呜嗡！（好啊，但我还不是很熟练，表现形式会有点怪，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}看完可别骂我……）
t_en: Grumph! (Okay! But I'm still practicing, so it might look a little weird... {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, please don't be disappointed after seeing this...)

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#247}做了个后空翻，空中转体三周半。
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#247} pulls off a triple backflip with a half twist.

t_ch: 呜嗡？呜嗡…（怎么样，喜欢吗？…没看清吗？呜呜，太遗憾了…没关系，想看多少遍都可以。）
t_en: Grumph? Grumph... (Well? Do you like it? ...You didn't catch it? Aw... that's too bad... But it's okay! I can do it as many times as you want!)

t_ch: 先玩到这吧。
t_en: Let's call it a day for now.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 呜嗡。（偷偷告诉{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我之前偷溜去悬锋城，交到了一个朋友——它叫黄金狮首。）
t_en: Grumph. (Psst, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I'll tell you a secret. I sneaked out to Castrum Kremnos earlier and made a new friend! It's called Chryseus Leo.)

t_ch: 呜嗡！（它把它的孩子托付给了我，告诉我它得了失语症，让我负起责任照顾它，我责任重大！）
t_en: Grumph! (It asked me to take care of its child, saying it had lost its voice and couldn't raise its child anymore. So I took responsibility. Big responsibility!)

t_ch: 呜嗡。（后来我才知道，它逗我玩呢，那就是个模型。送你了，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。）
t_en: Grumph. (Turns out it was just pulling my tail. That "child" was only a toy! Now I'll give it to you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. It's yours now.)

t_ch: 下次再来看你。
t_en: I'll come see you next time.

t_ch: 呜嗡！（嗯！记得早点来！实在太忙的话也可以不来…忙，忙点好啊……）
t_en: Grumph! (Yep! Be sure to come back soon! Though if you're super busy, that's okay too... Being busy is... good, right...?)

t_ch: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「来吧！绷带海豹，战斗还远远没有结束，再和我来一场激烈的豹豹碰碰大作战吧！」)∋
t_en: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "Bring it on, Bandaged Seal! The battle is far from over! Face me again in another intense round of Seal Slammers!" )∋

t_ch: o((•ω‡= )o「别惹我，等狂豹症发作时，我就是另一只海豹了！」)∋
t_en: o((•ω‡= )o "Don't you dare mess with me. Just wait till my Sealmania kicks in, and you'll see a whole different seal!" )∋

t_ch: o((•'ω´• )っ「不许吵不许吵，再吵下去，豹豹就给你们每只豹duangduang来一下，把你们平安送上天堂嗷！」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´• )っ "Hey! No yelling! One more shout and I'll boink on each of you all the way to heaven!" )∋

t_ch: 是红烧天堂吗？
t_en: Is this the paradise of braising?

t_ch: o((•'ω´• )っ「你在说什么？不许奖励它们豹！」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´• )っ "What are you talking about? Don't you reward them!" )∋

t_ch: 那只黑化海豹是怎么回事？
t_en: What's with that Dark Seal?

t_ch: (x３っ「Zzzzz……」)∋
t_en: (x３っ "Zzzzz..." )∋

t_ch: 戳一下。
t_en: Poke it.

t_ch: 醒醒——
t_en: Wake up...

t_ch: o((■ω■- )o「桀桀，是{NICKNAME}啊！豹正在进行阳光浴，从前的豹█渴望██吞噬一切，现在不知道为何，我变了███」
t_en: o((■ω■- )o "Hehe, it's you, {NICKNAME}. I'm basking in the sun. The old me used to be ████ hungered ███ to devour all. But now, I've changed ███ ███ ██████ somehow."

t_ch: o((■ω■- )o「内心一下变得好平和，好充实，好想洗心革面，做一只心灵健康的海豹。」
t_en: o((■ω■- )o "I feel so peaceful and fulfilled inside... I just want to turn over a new leaf and be a seal of spiritual health."

t_ch: o((■ω■- )o「连小海豹王国的██最强黑厄大人都重新变回白厄了，豹还有什么理由再黑化下去呢？」)∋
t_en: o((■ω■- )o "Even the █████ mighty Lord Pie-non of the baby seal kingdom has reverted to Phainon. What reason do I have to stay in the dark?" )∋

t_ch: o((■ω■- )o「但是，都怪██红温海豹，自从它来了，池水的温度一下子█豹涨，豹██差点要变成汗豹煲了！」
t_en: o((■ω■- )o "But it's all the fault of ████ Red Hot Seal! Ever since it came, the pool temperature has ██████ shot up so much ████ I've almost turned into a Sealburger!"

t_ch: 哼哼！我会代表正义再次出战！
t_en: Hmph! I shall fight again in the name of Justice!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜，该我出手了！泡泡不介意再次击败你们！
t_en: Awoo-woo! It's my time to shine! I don't mind beating you all again!

t_ch: 噢噢，我忘了，十敌大人和丹恒大人都不在，没有训练师在身边的小海豹，是不允许无证冲撞的哟！
t_en: Oops, I forgot! Neither Lord Yourdei nor Lord Dan Heng is here. And remember? A baby seal without trainers around isn't allowed to go bumping!

t_ch: o((★ω★- )o「泡泡可是有伙伴的，你们呢？」)∋
t_en: o((★ω★- )o "I have my partner here. Where's yours?" )∋

t_ch: 这个小奇美拉很得意了！
t_en: Look at this little chimera, so full of itself!

t_ch: 好像嗅到了一丝不妙的味道。
t_en: I've got a bad feeling about this.
o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "(Rage levels rising...)" )∋

t_ch: 你赢了。许多年以后，人们还记得翁法罗斯的第<unbreak>33550338</unbreak>次永劫回归，和一群酝酿出了「毁灭」欲的小海豹。
t_en: You win. Years later, people will still remember the <unbreak>33,550,338</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence of Amphoreus, and those baby seals who birthed the desire for "Destruction."

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: o((•'ω´• )っ「有的嗷有的嗷！沉甸甸的金海豹杯，离开翁法罗斯的时候，不要忘了把它带上。」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´• )っ "Yes, yes, of course! Don't forget to take this coveted Gold Seal Cup with you when you leave Amphoreus!" )∋

t_ch: o((•'ω´• )っ「希望你看到它的时候，就想起豹豹可爱的模样，记得常回来找我们玩嗷。」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´• )っ "Hope this reminds you of our adorable faces whenever you see it! Make sure to come back and play with us!" )∋

t_ch: 我爱你们，豹贝们！
t_en: I love you all, my little Seal-buns!

t_ch: o((•ω‡= )o「啧，好唐突！你…你竟然是直球派？」)∋
t_en: o((•ω‡= )o "Tch, that's so sudden! You... you're the straightforward type?" )∋

t_ch: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「可恶！幸亏豹的脸本身就红通通，不然，真被你这家伙看到脸红的模样了。」)∋
t_en: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "Argh! Lucky my face is naturally this red, or else you'd actually see me blush!" )∋

t_ch: o((•'ω´• )っ「还是{NICKNAME}厉害，一下子就止住它们的争斗了。」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´• )っ "{NICKNAME}, you're so amazing! You stopped their fight in an instant." )∋

t_ch: o((♥ω♥¯)o「我也爱你，给你一个豹抱——」)∋
t_en: o((♥ω♥¯)o "I love you too! Here's a seal hug!" )∋
